ui.walkHudHint: Return to the ranch to add more animals · click Walk again to send one home and earn XP

general.webhookLead: Webhook for this ranch (owner only). Saved automatically.
general.cashHintDeposit: Deposit cash from your pocket into the ranch.
general.cashHintWithdraw: Withdraw ranch cash to your pocket.

vacas.title: Cows
vacas.desc: Produces milk and calves. Essential for growing your ranch.

porcos.title: Pigs
porcos.desc: Produces meat. Great for quick profit.

ovelhas.title: Sheep
ovelhas.desc: Produces wool and meat. Ideal for textiles.

galinhas.title: Chickens
galinhas.desc: Produces eggs. Small, affordable, and useful every day.

cabras.title: Goats
cabras.desc: Produces goat milk. Hardy and easy to care for.

sellYardPanel.title: Livestock market
sellYardPanel.lead: Animals on walk — confirm sale with the buyer.
sellYardPanel.emptyHint: Walk your livestock here to sell.

animalsPanel.shopLead: Choose a species and purchase for your ranch.
animalsPanel.herdLead: All animals on your ranch — status and spawn in one list.
animalsPanel.emptyHerdLine: No animals on this ranch yet.
animalsPanel.emptyHerdHint: Go to the Animals tab to buy livestock.
animalsPanel.shopHint: Shop — species selected in the left column
animalsPanel.emptySpeciesHint: Go to the Animals tab to buy one.
animalsPanel.wanderRadiusHint: Walk only — how far animals stay from you while on a walk.

structures.shopLead: Species-specific troughs, chicken coop, and storage chest — at most one of each type per ranch.
structures.lead: Species-specific troughs, chicken coop, and storage chest — at most one of each type per ranch.
structures.hireLead: Hire workers using their server ID.
structures.onePerType: One per type on this ranch
structures.feedDesc: Hay for your {species} on this ranch.
structures.chestDesc: Shared storage for owner and workers. Max 1 per ranch.

crew.title: Crew
crew.lead: Hire by server ID, promote/demote roles, and manage ranch cash.
crew.cashHintWithdraw: Deposit takes cash from hand. Withdraw: owner and manager only.
crew.cashHintDeposit: Deposit takes cash from hand (manager or owner).

admin.title: Admin · Ranches
admin.tag: Teleport, edit, delete · server admin permission required
admin.searchPlaceholder: Search by ID, name, job, or Char ID…
admin.empty: No ranches in this list or search.
admin.toolsHint1: Filter with search. Per row: Go to, Edit, or Delete.
admin.toolsHint2: Press Esc to close the panel.
admin.deleteText: Ranch "{name}" (ID {id}) will be removed with animals, structures, and crew. This cannot be undone.
admin.editHint: Editing ranch ID {id}. Check move position to update NPC and zone at your location.
admin.placeHint: Created at your current position (NPC + ranch zone).
admin.ownerHint: VORP: charIdentifier · RSG: citizenid. Leave empty when «for sale» is checked.
admin.ownerServerIdHint: Optional: online player — fills Char ID automatically.
admin.usePosition: Move NPC and zone to my current position

notify.animalGrowing: The animal is still growing — no actions available.
notify.noRanchAccess: You don't own a ranch and aren't hired on any. Buy one at the seller NPC to use /ranch.
notify.walkStarted: Walk started — your animals will follow you.
notify.walkTooFarFromAnimal: Get closer to the animal to start the walk.
notify.walkAnimalMissing: Animal not found nearby — spawn it first.
notify.walkAnimalReturned: The animal returned to the ranch — you were too far away.
notify.sellNeedWalk: Walk the animal to the livestock market on the map.
notify.sellNoWalkAnimals: You have no animals with you to sell.
notify.sellAnimalTooFar: The animal is too far — bring it closer at the market.
notify.collectNoCatches: You didn't catch any items — try again.
notify.collectPartialHint: Time's up — you'll receive less product than usual.
notify.productNotReady: Product is not ready yet — wait for the icon to fill.
notify.vaccineNoAnimal: No sick animal nearby — get closer to one that needs care.
notify.closeRanchUiFirst: Close the ranch panel (/ranch) before opening admin.
notify.closeAdminFirst: Close the admin panel (/createranch) before opening the ranch UI.

animalMenu.careDesc: Refreshes wellbeing; helps growth over time.

notify.troughFoodEmpty: Feed trough empty — fill it for the herd.
notify.troughFoodLow: The feed trough is running low — worth checking.
notify.troughWaterEmpty: Water trough empty — your animals need to drink.
notify.troughWaterLow: Little water in the trough — the herd notices.
notify.placementOutsideRanch: That spot is not inside your ranch.
notify.placementTooFarFromYou: You are too far from that spot.
notify.wrongJob: You don't have the required job.
notify.ranchNameDuplicate: Another ranch already uses this name.
notify.careCooldown: This animal was recently cared for (try again in ~%d min).
notify.careSuccess: You spent time with the animal — it seems calmer.
notify.milkTooYoung: The animal is not big enough to milk yet.
notify.needsFeedWater: The animal needs feed and water in the troughs.
notify.collectNotReady: Product not ready yet — wait for the icon to fill.
notify.collectPartial: Partial collect: you got %d of %d (minigame not fully completed).
notify.woolTooYoung: The sheep is not big enough for wool yet.
notify.shearUnderweight: Not enough weight to shear (min. ~%.0f kg).
notify.maxAnimalsType: You already have the maximum of this animal type (max %d).
notify.dupChickenCoop: You already have a chicken coop on this ranch (max 1).
notify.dupStorageChest: You already have a storage chest on this ranch (max 1).
notify.dupTroughSameSpecies: You already have this trough on this ranch (max 1 per species).
notify.structureBought: Structure purchased. Place it with /ranch or open the UI nearby.
notify.managerOnlyHire: Only the owner or a manager can hire.
notify.alreadyWorker: This player is already on the ranch crew.
notify.workerLimitReached: Worker limit reached for this ranch.
notify.ranchInsufficientCash: Not enough cash in the ranch box.
notify.cmdCreateRanchUsage: Usage: /createranch [name job price radius] — no args opens admin panel.
notify.adminRanchListedForSale: Ranch listed for sale — animals, structures, and crew removed.
notify.adminInvalidOwner: Invalid Char ID or player has no loaded character.
notify.animalSold: Animal sold for $%d — added to ranch wallet.
notify.sellAnimalTooFar: The animal is too far — bring it closer at the market.

err.needRake: You need a rake in your inventory.
err.inventoryFullManure: Inventory full — free space and try again.
err.itemNotRegistered: Item "{item}" is not registered in vorp_inventory (items table). Check Config.Items.manure.
err.walkAlreadyActive: You are already walking an animal.
err.walkAlreadyThisAnimal: This animal is already with you.
err.walkCooldown: This animal needs rest before another walk (~%d min).
err.walkTooShort: Walk too short — need at least %d s and %d m with the animal.
err.walkInProgress: Finish or cancel the walk before this action.
err.sellNeedWalk: You must walk the animal to the livestock market.
err.sellNotAtYard: Go to the livestock market on the map (map blip).
err.sellTooYoung: Animal must be at least %.0f%% grown to sell.
err.sellTooWeak: Animal is too weak to sell.
err.sellLevelTooLow: Animal must be level %d or higher to sell.
err.sellInventoryFull: Inventory full — free space to receive sale items.
err.collectNoCatches: Not enough catches in the minigame.
err.walkNotInRanch: You must be inside the ranch to walk animals.
err.walkAddOnlyInRanch: Return to the ranch to add another animal to the walk.
